stream_required: B.E / B.Tech (Computer Science and Computer Engineering with orientation on Digital Technologies, Data Engineering, Data Analytics, Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning and Cloud Engineering)
date_of_joining: March 2026 (As interns on March, 2026 and full time employees post completion of the B. Tech course (Tentative July'26)

package_salary.ppo_ctc: Stipend during 5 months Internship : 25 K per month Salary after 5 months Internship : CTC 6 LPA + 1.00 Lakh Bonus as software engineers
package_salary.bond: Yes, 2 Years (Including Internship). Penalty on Non-compliance of Bond Rs 2.00 Lakh
